meaning: n.详细目录,存货,财产清册,总量
examples: They're likely to hold big fire sales to liquidate their inventory.
I did all of the ordering for the store, and I kept track of the inventory.
This concept appears in manufacturing where they count both scrap and inventory.
Quick to adjust, the company refreshed inventory and began an earnings recovery later in the year.
One sunny afternoon my entire inventory was bought out by a single customer: Cher.
